Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.spring.security.converters

Class AbstractUserConverter<T extends org.springframework.security.core.Authentication>

java.lang.Object
io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.spring.security.converters.AbstractUserConverter<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the authentication object that extends Authentication.
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.core.convert.converter.Converter<T,User>
public abstract class AbstractUserConverter<T extends org.springframework.security.core.Authentication> extends Object implements org.springframework.core.convert.converter.Converter<T,User>
Abstract base class for converting authentication objects into User instances.

This class provides a template for extracting user-related information such as username, roles, email, and avatar from a given authentication source. Subclasses are responsible for providing the actual implementation of attribute extraction and configuration-specific logic needed for their respective use cases.
